title: ferula iliensis
intro: Ferula iliensis, also known as Ili Turkmen Ferula, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the parsley family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its resin, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ferula iliensis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Ferula iliensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and oil, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Central Asia.
